{{Infobox character
| name = Demon of Twin Blades
| species = Remnant
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruler technique]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Demon of Twin Blades]], [[Remnant]], [[Truegold]], [[Underlord]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Demon]] of Twin Blades is a powerful [[Remnant]] that possesses strength comparable to an [[Underlord]]. It has a physical appearance similar to a gorilla, featuring a skull-like head with glowing yellow eyes and skin colored in a mixture of ash and deep blue. The creature's density is so significant that it can be mistaken for a living being rather than a [[Remnant]]. In combat, it utilizes two long, silvery blades inscribed with script that emit a heavy, cold energy. For several years, this entity provided protection for certain business rivals, allowing their commercial interests to flourish through the use of its formidable [[madra]]. During a confrontation in a snowy village, the demon's combat effectiveness was compromised after it lost its hands at the wrists, leading to its eventual defeat by [[Yerin]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Demon]] of Twin Blades is a [[Remnant]] of a man who once held the rank of [[Truegold]] and followed a [[Path]] involving destruction, blood, and [[sword madra]]. This entity possesses power comparable to an [[Underlord]] and takes the form of a gorilla with ash-colored and deep blue skin. Its appearance is further defined by an inhuman skull for a head featuring blazing yellow eyes. In combat, the creature wields long blades inscribed with silver script and utilizes a [[Ruler technique]] to drain the [[aura]] from its surroundings.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Demon of Twin Blades]] is a [[Remnant]] of a man on a [[Path]] combining [[sword]], blood, and [[destruction madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Demon of Twin Blades]] was originally [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Demon of Twin Blades]] exhibits power not unlike an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Demon of Twin Blades]] resembles a gorilla with deep blue and ash-colored skin.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Demon of Twin Blades]] has a head like an inhuman skull with blazing yellow eyes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Demon of Twin Blades]] uses a [[Ruler technique]] to drain nearby [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Demon of Twin Blades]] uses long, silvery scripted blades.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
